examples.title: Algorithm: Erosion
examples.description: Erodes an object by removing pixels from its boundary
examples.code:
ALGORITHM Erosion
INPUT: Image, Structuring Element
OUTPUT: Eroded Image

BEGIN
  FOR each pixel in the Image
    IF the Structuring Element is completely contained within the object
      SET the pixel at the center of the Structuring Element to 1
    ELSE
      SET the pixel at the center of the Structuring Element to 0
  END FOR
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the erosion operation, which shrinks an object by removing pixels from its boundary.

examples.title: Python: Erosion
examples.description: Erodes an object by removing pixels from its boundary
examples.explanation: This Python code implements the erosion operation using NumPy arrays.

examples.title: C: Dilation
examples.description: Dilates an object by adding pixels to its boundary
examples.explanation: This C code implements the dilation operation using 2D arrays.
